summary: Mobile-page layout with a very minimal white background, a small top logo/header area, a centered page title, then a vertical stack of large service tiles/cards. The style is sparse and clean, using thin gray rules, lots of whitespace, light gray placeholders, and small thin typography, ending with a compact contact form and a simple footer.

claims.value: {'dominant_colors': ['white', 'light gray', 'black/dark gray text', 'red accent'], 'overall_palette_feel': 'Very clean and restrained with a construction-brand red used sparingly for the logo and button, surrounded by neutral grays and lots of white space.'}

layout.summary: Mobile-page layout with a very minimal white background, a small top logo/header area, a centered page title, then a vertical stack of large service tiles/cards. The style is sparse and clean, using thin gray rules, lots of whitespace, light gray placeholders, and small thin typography, ending with a compact contact form and a simple footer.

sections.name: Top header / branding row
sections.description: At the very top left is a red 'R' logo mark. Centered near the top is the company name 'Red's Residential & Restaurant Construction' with a lighter tagline beneath it in quotes. There is no obvious full nav bar in the visible mobile screenshot, just branding elements in a header-like area on a white background.
sections.copy_gist: Company name and tagline for the construction business.

sections.name: Page title section
sections.description: A large centered page title reads 'Red's Service Division' with a thin horizontal line directly underneath spanning most of the text width. This sits above the service listings and acts as the main heading of the page.

sections.name: Service tiles / gallery stack
sections.description: Below the title is a vertical sequence of large square/rectangular service cards. The first card shows a cropped image collage with a visible left/right slider chevron overlay on the image area and the label 'Drywall Repair' near the bottom. Subsequent cards are mostly light gray placeholders with centered bottom labels such as 'Framing & Trim' and two repeated 'Service Name' placeholders. The cards are stacked one after another with generous spacing between them.
sections.copy_gist: Individual services, one real/featured tile followed by placeholder entries.

sections.name: Contact us section
sections.description: Centered heading 'Contact Us' with a thin underline and a short subheading 'A Problem for You, is a Job for Us!' appears above a simple contact form. The form includes three small single-line inputs in a row for First Name, Last Name, and Email *; below them is a larger multi-line textarea labeled 'Describe the Job *'. A small red 'Send' button sits to the right beneath the textarea area.
sections.copy_gist: Short inquiry form inviting users to describe a job.

sections.name: Footer
sections.description: At the bottom there is a simple footer split visually across the width: a small licensing note on the left ('Licensed General Contractor #112389'), centered footer links ('Home', 'Red's Service Division', 'Our Story', and 'Our Clients'), a phone number and email with tiny icons below, and certification/badge logos on the right including a TimberTech Pro badge and a silver/gray square emblem.

header.nav_style: Minimal, not a prominent full nav; branding-only header feel on mobile with centered company name/tagline and a logo mark on the left.
header.links: No visible top links in the screenshot; navigation appears deferred to the footer.
header.sticky?: No evidence of sticky behavior in the screenshot.

hero.headline_gist: The page hero is effectively the large centered title 'Red's Service Division' rather than a photo-led banner.
hero.subhead: Company name/tagline at the top and the page title underlined beneath.
hero.primary_CTA: No primary CTA in the hero area.
hero.imagery: No large hero image; the first service tile contains the only visible imagery, with a cropped construction/interior photo and slider arrows.

color_impressions.overall_palette_feel: Very clean and restrained with a construction-brand red used sparingly for the logo and button, surrounded by neutral grays and lots of white space.

typography_impressions.heading/body_feel: Thin, modern, light-weight typography with modest contrast between headings and body text.
typography_impressions.scale: Large page title, medium section headings, small labels and footer text.
typography_impressions.weight: Mostly light to regular weight; headings are not overly bold, giving a soft minimalist appearance.

layout.corner_style: Mostly square corners with simple rectangular inputs/cards; no strong rounding is visible.
layout.imagery_style: Sparse and utilitarian. The only visible photo is tightly cropped and partially obscured within a service tile; the rest are gray placeholders, making the page feel like a structured template or service catalog.

cta_inventory.label: Send
cta_inventory.location: Contact form, below the textarea, aligned to the right

footer.columns: Three visual zones: left legal/license text, center nav/contact links, right certification badges.

responsive_notes: The mobile layout is single-column and vertically stacked.
Service cards are full-width or near-full-width with large vertical spacing.
The contact form compresses into a compact block with three inputs in one row when space allows.
Footer elements remain grouped but small; badges sit to the right while links are centered.
Text sizes and dividers are modest to preserve whitespace on a narrow viewport.
